assertions.assertion: Sets options.MutualTls.Enabled = true in AddIdentityServer options
Sets options.MutualTls.DomainName = 'mtls' for the mTLS subdomain
Calls AddMutualTlsSecretValidators() on the IdentityServer builder
Configures the client secret with Type = SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint (or IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint)
Adds certificate authentication scheme (AddCertificate) and references it via MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme
assertions.rationale: The response does not add a certificate authentication scheme with AddCertificate() or set MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme. It only configures the mTLS options and client secret but omits the authentication scheme setup needed to extract the certificate from the TLS connection.
